title: The Dude in Me
posterAlt: The Dude in Me (2019) movie poster
tmdbOverview: Dong-hyun is a high school student. One day, he falls from the rooftop and bumps into Pan-soo who is a passerby. Pan-soo is a member of a criminal organization. When the two men wake up in the hospital, they discover that they have switched bodies.
synopsis: Released in 2019, The Dude in Me is a fantasy, comedy and action film from South Korea. It carries a 6.9 rating on IMDb. It's one of the titles we feature across our 2010s and genre rankings. It carries a IIB certification (HK rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
